name: recon-kit-mcp
description: Safe, structured network & security reconnaissance tools (DNS, WHOIS, TLS, HTTP security headers) for AI coding agents — each with a graded verdict.
long_description: An MCP server that gives AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cline) read-only network and security reconnaissance tools: dns_recon (DNS/WHOIS/SPF-DMARC-DKIM with a graded email-security assessment), tls_check (certificate, protocols, ciphers, known vulnerabilities), http_headers_audit (CSP, HSTS, and other security headers), and port_scan (single-host TCP connect scan, capped at 1024 ports). Returns clean JSON with letter grades. For authorized testing, CTF, and education only.
